actions.title: Temporary forwarder switch for next 2 POs
actions.description: Revert to MaerskLine Global for PO-HC-2024-8920 and PO-HC-2024-8935 to stabilize port-to-DC transit time

actions.title: Rollback Arabic label template to V2.1
actions.description: Instruct supplier to immediately revert to approved label template V2.1 for all towel/bedding SKUs

actions.title: Sample approval for corrected labels within 48h
actions.description: Supplier to submit 3 sample SKUs with corrected labels for QC approval before next shipment

actions.title: Block ASN submission if carton_count mismatch
actions.description: Enable system validation to reject ASN where carton count differs by >2% from PO

actions.title: Block ASN if SSCC missing
actions.description: Enforce SSCC barcode requirement for all cartons in ASN submission

actions.title: Prioritize GRN for Top 30 SKUs
actions.description: Fast-track receiving process for high-velocity bedding/towel SKUs from SuratHomeTex
actions.expectedImpact: GRN cycle time: 5.5h → 2.5h for priority SKUs

actions.title: Auto-escalate if compliance_fail >2% for 3 consecutive days
actions.description: Trigger Category Head notification and supplier scorecard penalty if threshold exceeded

actions.title: Freeze new PO release pending plan execution
actions.description: Hold PO-HC-2024-8945 and subsequent orders until OTIF recovers above 85%
